title: Round State
description: Tracks iterative research round state. Written after each round, read at the start of the next round and by the final report writer. Lives in the CWD alongside the research report.

topic_slug.description: URL-safe slug for the research topic, used to name artifacts like <slug>-research-report.md.

convergence_reason.description: Why the loop is continuing or has stopped. Set by the gap-classification step.

gaps_addressed.description: Gap IDs from gaps.json that were addressed in this round (e.g. ['G1', 'G3']).

gaps_remaining.description: Gap IDs that remain open after this round.

run_ids_all.description: All run IDs used across all rounds so far, in order. Append each new run_id.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last update.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about this round (e.g. why a gap was reclassified out of scope).

example.notes: G2 fully resolved by FlashAttention-2 paper. G4 reclassified to ENGINEERING.
